ads.title: Faculty — Mechanical Engineering
ads.raw_text_excerpt: Development of AI/ML Techniques-based Computational Methodology for Thermo-fluids engineering; (1-ii) Data-Driven Constitutive modeling of Cells, Tissues, and Organs; and (1-iii) Digital Manufacturing (system simulation, digital threads, digital twins, and manufacturing analytics). (2) Biomechanical Engineering: (2-i) Biomedical flows, (2-ii) Bio-heat transfer; (2-iii) Kinematics and dynamics of human/animal locomotion; and (2-iv) 3D-Organ Printing. (3) Heat Transfer, Combustion and Energy Systems: (3-i) Refrigeration, Air-conditioning, Cryogenics, and heat pumps; (3-ii) Thermal Management of EV batteries and data centers; (3-iii) Hydrogen combustion; (3-iv) Radiative heat transfer for defense and space applications; and (3-v) Nuclear Engineering, Neutronics and Radiation Detection. (4) Manufacturing Processes, Systems & Automation: (4-i) Metal Casting (low-pressure and high-pressure die casting); (4-ii) Manufacturing Systems, Operation modeling and analysis; (4-iii) Manufacturing Automation and Control; (4-iv) Polymer processing; (4-v) Machine health monitoring and prognostics; (4-vi) Semiconductor fabrication and metrology; and (4-vii) Optical and biomedical device fabrication. (5) Materials Modeling and Characterization: (5-i) Advanced experimental in-situ mechanics (high temperature materials, short time scales and high spatial resolution); (5-ii) Reliability, mechanics and failure of integrated circuits and data storage devices; and (5-iii) Advanced Non-Destructive Evaluation (Infrared thermography, Non-Linear Ultrasonics, Tomography, TeraHz radio wave imaging) (6) Micro/Nano Science and Engineering: (6-i) Experimental Transport Phenomena of Complex Fluids; and (6-ii) Non-Equilibrium Thermodynamics. (7) Robotics, Dynamics, and Control: (7-i) Multi-agent robotic systems; and (7-ii) Engineering Acoustics and industrial noise control. Sr. Academic Unit Areas of Specialization No. (8) Solid and Fluid Mechanics: (8-i) Tribology; and (8-ii) Fluid dynamics for Wind and Hydro Energy Applications. In addition to the above specific areas, applications from candidates possessing exceptional credentials in other areas are also welcome.

ads.raw_text_excerpt: Galaxy evolution and high-energy astrophysics Condensed Matter Physics (Experimental): 1. Core/demonstrated expertise in single crystal and/or epitaxial growth 2. Core/demonstrated expertise in emergent areas of superconductivity/quantum magnetism/ spintronics/ topological systems (materials and devices) 3. Core/demonstrated expertise in Time-resolved experiments to study different ultrafast processes in materials. Condensed Matter Physics (Theory): 1. Development and application of machine learning in quantum condensed matter 2. DFT+DMFT approach to strongly correlated systems 3. Quantum many body physics using artificial quantum platforms 4. Analytical approaches to topics such as non-equilibrium quantum dynamics, topological and interacting systems. Sr. Academic Unit Areas of Specialization No. High-energy Physics (Experimental): 1. Heavy ion/p-A/p-p collisions at collider energies: Hardware development 2. Experimental low-energy nuclear physics High-energy Physics (Theory): 1. Astro-particle physics 2. Beyond Standard model and collider physics 3. Perturbative and non-perturbative QCD 4. String theory and mathematical aspects of quantum field theory Optics/Photonics: 1. Experimental ion trap/cold atom physics 2. Experimental quantum optics 3. Experimental/Theoretical strong-field and attosecond physics Quantum Information (Theory): Fundamental theoretical research in quantum information theory with applications in quantum algorithms, quantum communication, quantum sensing, quantum error correction, and light-based quantum technologies Soft-matter Physics: Experimental soft matter physics and physics of biological systems: 1. Experimental soft matter physics, active matter physics and the physics of biological systems: Equilibrium and non-equilibrium phenomena in complex fluids 2. Study of self-assembly in soft matter systems and collective behavior, using techniques such as light microscopy, AFM, electron microscopy, optical tweezers, X-ray scattering Theoretical statistical physics with a focus on analytical techniques: 1. Analytical theories of model systems in and out of equilibrium. 2. Coarse-grained statistical field theories of non- equilibrium/active systems 3. Stochastic thermodynamics and information-theoretic approaches to biological systems

ads.title: Faculty — Applied Mechanics and Biomedical Engineering
ads.raw_text_excerpt: (a) At least one pre-PhD engineering degree (at the bachelor's or master's level) Specialization Area* (b) Post-doc research experience preferred * The department specializes in interdisciplinary research that broadly spans the fields of Solid Mechanics, Fluid Mechanics, and Biomedical Engineering. Applications are invited from candidates with strong engineering acumen and an interdisciplinary focus in addressing contemporary critical challenges that fits into at least one of the following specializations: (i) Computational Solid Mechanics focussing on cutting-edge methodologies that bridge solid mechanics and scientific computing, addressing fundamental challenges in areas such as multiscale/multiphysics modelling, phase field and nonlocal approaches to failure, advanced discretization methods, and the integration of physics-informed machine learning with rigorous mechanics-based modelling. (ii) Topology Optimization integrating active material mechanics for multifunctional adaptive systems. (iii) Experimental thermal–fluid science with a preference for research relevant to clean energy systems, advanced cooling technologies, micro-gravity environments or micro & modular nuclear reactors. (iv) AI-driven algorithm development for fluid mechanics. 1 Annexure -1(ver.2, dt.16.04.2026) (This version of Annexure‐1 supersedes all previous versions of Annexure‐1 released during this advertisement period. Applicants shall always ensure that they are referring to the current version of this Annexure ‐1, posted on https://facapp.iitm.ac.in/2026ra /). (v) Medical Instrumentation and Biomedical Signal/Image Processing: Novel clinical measurement and imaging systems (electrophysiology, clinical imaging modalities, surgical and interventional instruments) and the processing of physiological recordings (EEG, EMG, ECG, evoked potentials) and in vivo medical images for diagnosis, monitoring, surgical planning, and rehabilitation tracking. (vi) Physiological Systems Modelling: Computational and data-driven models of organ-system physiology (cardiovascular, musculoskeletal, respiratory) useful for patient-level prediction or control. Both mechanistic modelling and work at the interface of control theory and physiological regulation are encouraged. (vii) Data Science for Biomedical Engineering: AI/ML, IoT, and immersive technologies (VR/AR/MR) applied to real-world hospital and clinical workflows: patient monitoring, clinical decision support, outcome prediction, and surgical training. The emphasis is on tools that go beyond proof-of-concept, with real clinical data and deployment in practice. 3 Biotechnology

The number of vacancies is about 40 and the number of vacancies will be liable to change. The extent of reservation will be as follows: SC-15%; ST-7.5%; OBC(NCL)-27%; EWS-10%. The unfilled vacancies of the previous recruitments (post CEI Act.2019) may also be included for recruitment apart from the above number of vacancies. IIT Madras is committed to fostering a diverse and inclusive academic environment, and women candidates are strongly encouraged to apply. (i) Experimental cancer biology The prospective applicant is expected to establish a research group focused on addressing fundamental questions in understanding of the molecular genetic mechanisms of cancer progression / tumour-immune cell cross-talk / cancer metabolism. Expertise in using animal models and/or human primary cancer tissue samples to address these questions, evidenced by peer reviewed publications, is essential. ads.pdf_excerpt: * The department specializes in interdisciplinary research that broadly spans the fields of Solid Mechanics, Fluid Mechanics, and Biomedical Engineering. Applications are invited from candidates with strong engineering acumen and an interdisciplinary focus in addressing contemporary critical challenges that fits into at least one of the following specializations: (i) Computational Solid Mechanics focussing on cutting-edge methodologies that bridge solid mechanics and scientific computing, addressing fundamental challenges in areas such as multiscale/multiphysics modelling, phase field and nonlocal approaches to failure, advanced discretization methods, and the integration of physics-informed machine learning with rigorous mechanics-based modelling. (ii) Topology Optimization integrating active material mechanics for multifunctional adaptive systems. (iii) Experimental thermal–fluid science with a preference for research relevant to clean energy systems, advanced cooling technologies, micro-gravity environments or micro & modular nuclear reactors.

ads.title: Faculty — Aerospace Engineering
ads.raw_text_excerpt: Established in 1964, the aerospace engineering department is among the leading departments for research and education in aerospace engineering comprising the core specializations of aerodynamics, flight mechanics, propulsion, and aerospace structures. Over the years, the department has engaged with a large number of organizations including NAL, GTRE, HAL, DRDL, ADE, ARDE, ADA, ADRDE, ISRO, IAF, USAF, BARC, Boeing, Pratt and Whitney, Airbus and GE for scientific and engineering research. The department seeks applications from dynamic and motivated candidates with excellent academic record along with specialization in the any of the following domains: Aerodynamics stream : – Aeroacoustics; Aerodynamics of bio-inspired vehicles; Fluid-structure interactions (FSI), computational FSI; High-fidelity computational aerodynamics simulation for low/high-speed flow regimes; Testing and instrumentation for low/high-speed flows. Aerospace propulsion stream : – Turbomachinery: experimental methods, full-scale computations, and flutter; Electric propulsion; Novel propulsion systems for drones and space applications; Solid propellants. Aerospace structures stream : – Dynamics and vibrations of flexible structures; Aeroelasticity: experimental and computational methods; Experimental solid mechanics; Design of aerospace vehicle structures (including vehicles for space exploration); Structures for spacecraft and satellite applications; Structural integrity and health monitoring. Flight dynamics and controls stream : – Flight dynamics of aircraft (fixed, rotary and flapping wings), coupled computational aeromechanics and control; Satellite and spacecraft dynamics; Flight vehicle guidance and control. Other areas : – Space vehicles and payload technologies; Green/Sustainable aviation; Stealth technologies for aerospace applications; Scientific machine learning surrogates and digital twins for aerospace applications; Unmanned aerial vehicle technology (design, integration, guidance & control, and their applications); Multi-disciplinary design optimization (MDO); Designs for futuristic flight vehicles; Avionics and aerospace systems, Integrated vehicle health management; Coupled aero-structure-EM computations; Internal aerodynamics; Novel sensors for aerospace and space applications; Next-generation materials and manufacturing processes for aerospace applications; High energy material/energetics for aerospace applications; It is strongly desirable that at least one of the degrees should be in Aerospace/Aeronautical engineering. The department website link is https://www.iitk.ac.in/aero Professor Sanjay Kumar, HOD This email address is being protected from spambots. You need JavaScript enabled to view it.

ads.title: Faculty — Biological Sciences and Bioengineering
ads.raw_text_excerpt: Biological Sciences and Bioengineering (BSBE) is a multi-disciplinary department addressing both basic and applied areas of Life Sciences and Bioengineering. Research in BSBE is focused on: regenerative medicine (stem cell biology, tissue engineering, drug delivery, biomedical device); understanding protein structure-function relationship (structural and computational biology); engineering approaches to understanding biological systems (biomechanics, image processing, electrophysiology, computational modeling), cellular, molecular, developmental, and neuro-biology addressing fundamental aspects of cell differentiation and growth; disease models - animal models for human diseases. Applications for faculty positions at all levels are invited in the areas. Biomedical Engineering – Electrical/Electronics/Mechanical engineers developing biomedical sensors, devices and diagnostics are particularly encouraged to apply, The other areas of interest are - Neuroengineering, Biomaterials, Tissue eengineering and drug delivery systems. Structural and computational biology - Computational biology with specialization in AI/machine learning, big data and all related areas, biomolecular simulations, systems biology, synthetic biology, Microbiology and immunology - Infectious disease and antimicrobial resistance, Immunology, Cancer Immuno-Therapy, Immune engineering. Basic Sciences – Cell Biology, Developmental Biology using classical and molecular genetic approaches in model organisms Applicants are expected to organize and participate in multi-disciplinary research and contribute to teaching both at the undergraduate and graduate levels. Further, applicants with exceptional achievements in any area of Biological Sciences and Bioengineering are also welcome to apply. The department website link is https://www.iitk.ac.in/bsbe Professor Ashwani Kumar Thakur, HOD This email address is being protected from spambots. You need JavaScript enabled to view it.

ads.title: Faculty — Cognitive Science
ads.raw_text_excerpt: Applications are invited covering all areas and topics in Cognitive Science. Individuals who investigate the mind with innovative quantitative, computational, and machine-learning methodologies are particularly encouraged to apply. We also invite applications from candidates whose research agenda focuses on developing applications grounded in Cognitive Science in domains including human computer interaction, education, and clinical therapies. We anticipate successful candidates will be actively pursuing research programs that unite different levels of explanation and teach courses in cognitive science at graduate and undergraduate levels. Applications for faculty positions are invited at all levels: namely, Assistant Professor, Associate Professor, and Professor. ads.title: Faculty — Computer Science and Engineering
ads.raw_text_excerpt: The Computer Science and Engineering department of IIT Kanpur would like to invite faculty applications in all fields of Computer Science and Computer Engineering. The department is particularly strong in theoretical computer science, machine learning, data mining and database technologies, cyber physical systems including unmanned systems, and cyber security. There are also outstanding faculty in program analysis, compilers, computer architecture, networked distributed systems, human-computer interaction, visual computing, privacy-preserving technologies, and algorithms. Any applicant interested in joining an outstanding group in any of these fields will surely be benefited in a thriving research environment in this department. The department has established a large center on cyber security of critical infrastructures, a center for cyber physical systems, and a center for intelligent systems. We have created advanced and specialized labs infrastructure related to these areas. So, newly joining faculty will benefit from these facilities, the human-resource, and the multi-faceted research environment of these centers. We are very keen to hire multiple faculty at all levels depending on the experience level of candidates in the following fields. Cyber Security, Cryptography and Crypto Engineering Internet of Things Networking, Software Defined Networking, Cognitive Networks Deep Learning, Neural network Human Centric Computing Human-Computer Interaction Computer Architecture Operating Systems Compiler Technology, Program Analysis Formal Methods and Formal Verification Application of Machine Learning in various problem domains Very Large Database

Earth Sciences The Department of Earth Sciences at IIT Kanpur (http://www.iitk.ac.in/es/) invites applications for faculty positions in specific fields of geosciences. Space, Planetary & Astronomical Sciences & Engineering (SPASE): The Department of Space, Planetary & Astronomical Sciences and Engineering (SPASE) is a new department established with a vision to actively contribute to the space science research requirements of the country. We are a group of astronomers, planetary scientists and space instrumentation engineers under one umbrella, providing a unique opportunity to work in synergy in the field of space science and exploration. We are rapidly growing in frontier areas of space science research and have academic programs to groom the next generation of space scientists and engineers. We are looking for faculty members in all branches of Space, Planetary and Astronomical Sciences and Engineering. In particular, the department is keen to hire faculty in the following areas: Space and Astronomical Instrumentation All areas of Space and spacecraft technology (e.g., mission planning, spacecraft design and control, etc.) Planetary Science and Cartography (Remote Sensing, Sample Science, Experimentation, Modeling of planetary processes) Astronomy and Astrophysics For more information about the department, please visit our website: https://www.iitk.ac.in/space . ads.title: Faculty — Sustainable Energy Engineering
ads.raw_text_excerpt: Applications are invited from interested faculty candidates (for assistant and associate professor positions) having a strong engineering background and proven track record in to any of the following priority areas: Solar Photovoltaics and Solar Thermal Energy Generation Fuel Cells Wind/Hydro/Tidal Energy Nuclear Energy Green Hydrogen Generation Waste to Energy Hydrogen Storage and Transport Thermal Energy Storage Systems Renewable-Based Power Systems Smart-Grid and Micro-Grid Electric Vehicles Control Systems and Optimization Energy Modelling, Energy Transition and Decarbonization Energy Efficient Built-Environment, Net-Zero and Smart Buildings Applicants must have a strong track record of conducting cutting-edge research in any of the above areas with expertise in one or more of the following aspects i.e. design, modelling, analysis and development of materials and devices, processes and systems (for example, thermal and electrochemical systems), electrical/electronics/control engineering, integration of large/deployment scale systems, energy modelling and energy policy. The preferred candidates must hold a PhD degree with an excellent academic record throughout and should preferably possess an undergraduate degree in an appropriate area of engineering. Candidates with an excellent track record in any other exciting, futuristic areas of Sustainable Energy Engineering that are not listed above may also be considered. Candidates with an excellent track record in any other exciting futuristic areas of Energy Sustainability that are not listed above may also be considered.

ads.title: Faculty — Academic Programmes
ads.raw_text_excerpt: The department is currently offering Masters' and Doctoral programs as well as minor options to undergraduates and master’s options to dual degree students. Facilities and support: The institute possesses extensive laboratory facilities with many advanced state-of-the-art equipment to carry out cutting-edge research and development. The institute also offers a generous start-up package for initiating the research, a relocation package, and a top-up salary (for the first three years) to all the new faculty members. See ‘Other information’ at the end of the advertisement for more details. For more information, please visit the department website https://www.iitk.ac.in/see . Professor Ashish Garg, HOD This email address is being protected from spambots. You need JavaScript enabled to view it. Wadhwani School of AI & Intelligent Systems (WSAIS): The Department of Intelligent Systems at Indian Institute of Technology Kanpur invites bright, innovative, and dedicated scholars to join our newly established department to shape the future of Intelligent Systems. We are looking for talented faculty members across all relevant disciplines to help build a cutting-edge department focused on advancing intelligent systems and related fields. DIS is a part of a School (WSAIS) which is designed as an interdisciplinary organization to sustain impactful research and development in IIT Kanpur. The 5 Centers that DIS faculty will interact with are: Wadhwani Center for Advanced AI (CAA) Wadhwani Center for Developing Intelligent Systems (CDIS) Wadhwani Center for Cybersecurity and Cybersecurity of Cyber-physical Systems (C3i) Wadhwani Center for Robotics (CR) Wadhwani Center for AI Policy and Outreach (CAPO). Research Areas of Interest We welcome applications in a broad range of research areas, including but not limited to: Artificial Intelligence Machine Learning Data Science and Big Data Analytics Natural Language Processing Computer Vision and Pattern Recognition Embedded and Cyber-Physical Systems Optimization and Control Robotics and Autonomous Systems Pervasive and Mobile Computing

ads.raw_text_excerpt: A candidate who has experience in publishing in the following venues would be a good fit: AAAI, IJCAI, AAMAS, ICAPS, ICML, NeurIPS, ICLR, SIGIR, WWW, KDD, ACL, ENMLP, NAACL, CVPR, ICCV, EMSOFT, RTSS, RTAS, ICCPS, HSCC, CDC, ACC, ICRA, IROS, RSS, MobiCom, MobiSys, SenSys, CCS, IEEE S&P, USENIX Security, FSE, ICSE, ASE, CHI, UBICOMP, and Marquee conferences or journals in CSE or EE. R&D: DIS and WSAIS aim to hire researchers, who have demonstrated high calibre either in research published in the top-most venues, or in technology translation work done on a large-scale.

ads.title: Faculty — Job Description
ads.raw_text_excerpt: A faculty member is expected to conduct cutting-edge research in her/his area of expertise leading to high-quality publications and teach 2-3 courses per year. S/he is expected to attract funding for her/his research and development activities from government or private funding agencies. The department and the school highly encourage, and support, entrepreneurial and consultation activities.

ads.title: Faculty — Application Process
ads.raw_text_excerpt: Application for the faculty position is accepted throughout the year. Interested candidates are requested to officially apply through the IITK website ( https://pingala.iitk.ac.in/IITKFR-0/login ), and email the following documents to This email address is being protected from spambots. You need JavaScript enabled to view it. . “R&D vision” statement. Please elaborate on: Why WSAIS is a good fit for you in the long-term? How will you contribute to the development/translational focus of the School? E.g. the ability to raise funding and deliver on projects are key desirables: How do you see yourself in that role? Teaching statement. Please elaborate on teaching students, as well as, large-scale training in the School Outreach activities. CV. Referees. List 3-5 known experts who are able to comment on the achievements and the future potential of the candidate. The department will contact the referees for their recommendation letters for the candidate. Selected candidates will be invited for a seminar and an interaction with the existing faculty members and students. The institute will cover travel expenses for shortlisted candidates within India. Why Join Us? Our department offers a vibrant, collaborative, and flexible work environment with attractive support for research, teaching and professional growth. Ours is a unique setup in the Indian academia wherein the opportunity of working on local problems, national projects, and industry collaborations is baked in its foundation. This is made possible by a generous grant pledge from the Wadhwani Charitable Foundation (WCF) and is implemented by its various innovation/entrepreneurial networks (e.g. WIN). You will be expected to lead a domain of this national SuperHub and mentor the other Hubs. Professor Nitin Saxena, Dean This email address is being protected from spambots. You need JavaScript enabled to view it. Professor Indranil Saha, HOD This email address is being protected from spambots. You need JavaScript enabled to view it. Appointments in the relevant Departments to work jointly with the Interdisciplinary Programs (IDPs)

(iv) Applied Psychology: Application of Psychology to health-wellbeing, poverty-scarcity, gender inequality, behavioral nudges, SDGs. ads.raw_text_excerpt: Advertisement for the posts of 1 Post-Doctoral Fellow in an ANRF-Sponsered project (Rolling Advertisement), Department of Mechanical and Aerospace Engineering, IIT Hyderabad  Advertisement for the posts of 1 Post-Doctoral Fellow in an ANRF-Sponsered project (Rolling Advertisement), Department of Mechanical and Aerospace Engineering, IIT Hyderabad
ads.pdf_excerpt: Advertisement for the posts of 1 Post-Doctoral Fellow in an ANRF- Sponsored Project (Rolling Advertisement) Applications are invited for time-bound Project Appointments under the following project. Selection: • This is a rolling advertisement; the PI will evaluate and shortlist the applications received every 15 days until suitable candidates are selected. • The PI will shortlist candidates and the selection committee based on eligibility and fit for the advertised position. • Shortlisted candidates will be called for an online interview. Shortlisted candidates will be informed by email about the interview date and time. • Candidates with prior relevant experience will be given preference. Joining will be immediate after selection. • The position will be kept open if no suitable candidate is found.

ads.pdf_excerpt: Essential Qualifications and Work Experience: PhD in Biotechnology, Microbiology, Nanobiotechnology, Bioengineering, Nanotechnology, any other related interdisciplinary engineering and/or science, from a reputed institute with substantial sound knowledge and experience in molecular biology techniques and a publication record from PhD work and related work. • Human stem cell culture (preferably iPSC) • 3D cell culture / organoid development (preferred but not mandatory) • Cell differentiation and molecular biology techniques • Experience on cell culture, primary cell (e.g., stem cells) culture, and materials-stem cell/cell interaction studies • Experience on Stem Cells culture and maintenance preferred • Sound knowledge and proficient in molecular biological techniques such as quantitative PCR, RTPCR, ELISA, Western Blotting and immunoassay, etc. • Proficient in designing and executing experiments, interpretation of research results, writing reports and manuscripts, and managing and guiding PhD/JRF/SRF candidates

ads.raw_text_excerpt: Advertisement for Consultant Positions - HMDA: 2D GIS Base Map for HMR & 3D Digital Twin for TCUR Region Project by Centre for Geospatial AI and Digital Twins (CGDT) & Department of Design, IIT Hyderabad  Advertisement for Consultant Positions - HMDA: 2D GIS Base Map for HMR & 3D Digital Twin for TCUR Region Project by Centre for Geospatial AI and Digital Twins (CGDT) & Department of Design, IIT Hyderabad
ads.pdf_excerpt: • Defining detailed technical expectations and acceptance criteria • Rigorously vetting vendor requirements, designs, and methodologies • Validating all deliverables and approving or rejecting outputs at every stage • Ensuring adherence to quality, completeness, and timelines • Defining stage-wise deliverable checklists and validation frameworks End-to-End Technical Oversight • Geodetic & Survey: Validate GNSS/CORS design, GCP distribution, georeferencing methodology and coordinate systems • Survey Execution: Review outputs from LiDAR, photogrammetry, UAV, terrestrial, bathymetric, and GPR surveys • Data Processing: Validate point cloud processing, terrain models, and orthophotos • GIS Data: Verify topology, attributes, and cross-layer consistency • 3D Models & BIM: Validate LoD compliance, geometry, semantics, georeferencing, and interoperability • Applications & Integration: Review system architecture, applications, APIs, and dashboards • Testing & Go-Live: Validate test plans, UAT readiness, and system performance D. Stage-Gate Governance & Approval Authority • Enforce structured validation across Requirements → Design → Survey → Data → Models → Applications → UAT → Go-Live • Ensure no stage progresses without formal approval E. • Rolling advertisement — applications reviewed every 15 days until all posts are filled • Only shortlisted candidates will be called for interview (online or offline) • PI reserves the right to alter the number of vacancies or keep posts open until a deserving candidate is found • Shortlisted candidates will be intimated via email with suitable interview date • No TA/DA or accommodation will be provided for attending the personal interview • Candidates with prior experience in relevant areas will be given preference • Immediate joining…

ads.pdf_excerpt: Department of Physics Indian Institute of Technology Hyderabad Kandi Sangareddy Telangana – 502284 Advertisement for the Post of Research Associate-I (RA-I) Applications are invited for the Research Associate-I (RA-I) position in a research project funded by DRDO to be carried out at the Department of Physics, IIT Hyderabad. Year 2: Data Analysis and Processing: management of large datasets, including satellite telemetry, radar observations, and optical tracking data. Processing, cleaning, and analysing the data to track and predict space object trajectories. 4 Funding agency DRDO, Government of India 5 Duration of the project 2 Years, with a possibility of further extension based on performance, funding availability and an opportunity to work with the DRDO Labs. 6 Number of vacancies 1 7 Monthly compensation Rs. 58,000 + HRA (as per Govt. norm) 8 Minimum eligibility 1.​ M.Sc. in Physics/Astrophysics/Space Physics from requirements recognised institutions with a minimum 70% Marks or 7.0 CGPA OR 2.​ First class in M.Tech/M.E. in Computer Science/Electronics and Instrumentation/Aerospace from a recognised institute AND 3.​ Doctor of Philosophy (Ph.D.) in Physics/Astrophysics/Space Physics/Computer Science/Electronics and Instrumentation/Aerospace from a recognised institute (Thesis submitted can also apply) 9 Desirable qualifications Knowledge of orbital dynamics, Astrodynamics, or experience with the operation of a telescope, intermediate/advanced Python programming skills, knowledge of AI/ML techniques and applications (intermediate to advanced level)

areas: Experimental Validation of LEO Objects using Optical Tracking
Satellite telemetry, radar observations, optical tracking data analysis
structured_positions.methods_preference: Python (intermediate/advanced); AI/ML; data processing of large datasets

qualifications.other: M.Sc. in Physics/Astrophysics/Space Physics with min 70% or 7.0 CGPA OR First class M.Tech/M.E. in CS/Electronics and Instrumentation/Aerospace; AND Ph.D. in Physics/Astrophysics/Space Physics/CS/Electronics and Instrumentation/Aerospace (thesis submitted may apply).

structured_positions.general_eligibility: Age limit 32 years as of 31 July 2025. 2 years duration extendable.
structured_positions.raw_section_text: Research Associate-I in DRDO-funded research project at IIT Hyderabad Physics Department. Project: Numerical Simulation of Orbital Propagation and Experimental Validation of LEO Objects using Optical Tracking Approach. ads.pdf_excerpt: Applications are invited from candidates with excellent academic background and excellent mathematical skills for the research project entitled, ‘Innovative and cost-effective detection and removal of harmful heavy metal ions and micro plastics from water with novel sensing mechanisms, analog circuits and light-weight AI on the edge’ in a purely time-bound manner undertaken in the Department of Electrical Engineering, IIT Hyderabad. This is a rolling advertisement with no last date for application. Applications will be invited till suitable candidate is found. Details are as follows: Name of the post Research Associate I Number of vacancies 1 Title of the research project Innovative and cost-effective detection and removal of harmful heavy metal ions and micro plastics from water with novel sensing mechanisms, analog circuits, and light-weight AI on the edge Description of the job Conducting electrochemical sensing experiments of heavy metal ions and microplastics in water, Developing smart sensing systems Remuneration INR 58,000 per month (consolidated) Essential qualifications First-class Bachelor’s degree (B.Tech/B.E.) in Water Resources /Chemical/Materials Engineering/Metallurgical Engineering allied areas from a recognized university AND First-class Master's degree (M.Tech/ M.E.) in Water Resources / Environmental/Chemical Engineering/Materials Engineering/allied areas from a recognized university AND Doctor of Philosophy (Ph.D.) in Materials Engineering/ Chemical Engineering/ Water resources/ allied areas from a recognized university (Thesis submitted can also apply)

ads.pdf_excerpt: Applications are invited for the post of AI/ML Engineers in the area of Artificial Intelligence for the AI Centre of Excellence (project of national importance) at IIT-Hyderabad. The selected candidates will have an opportunity to work with a diverse consortium of experts across leading academic institutions, industry partners, government organizations, NGOs and international organizations. Name of Post ML Engineer Number of Vacancies Upto 10 Project Topic Machine Learning, Engineering, Sustainable Cities, Urban Governance Consolidated Pay Rs. 60000 – Rs 90000 pm Appointment Tenure This is a contract position for a duration of 6 months, and is extensible based on performance (and fund availability). The position can be converted to MTech/PhD subject to the requirements of the department, and the candidate’s performance. Essential Qualification • Bachelor’s degree in Computer Science and Engineering/Artificial Intelligence/Mathematics and Computing/ECE (or any related discipline) with at least 60% marks. • Fluency in English writing and technical communication. Please keep the following documents ready before filling the form: • Latest CV with marks percentage in each academic program, experience and publication lists • Proof of 1-year experience (e.g offer letter/bonafide certificate/relieving letter/etc) Due Date: We will consider applications until 31 July 2024; applications will be reviewed and processed as they are received. Selection Procedure Candidates will be shortlisted based on the eligibility criteria, academic record and relevant experience. Only shortlisted candidates will be intimated through email for the online interview by the selection committee. Merely meeting the criteria may not guarantee a call for an interview.

ads.title: Advertisement for the post of Research Associate (RA) positions in the project of MEMS based Piezo Sensors and Bio Sensors
ads.raw_text_excerpt: Advertisement for the post of Research Associate (RA) positions in the project of MEMS based Piezo Sensors and Bio Sensors  Advertisement for the post of Research Associate (RA) positions in the project of MEMS based Piezo Sensors and Bio Sensors
ads.pdf_excerpt: Applications are invited from the Indian nationals for the post of Research Associate in the area of Micromachining and MEMS with relevant prior experience. Name of the post Research Associate (RA) Number of vacancies 2 Sponsored Project Fabrication of high temperature piezo pressure sensor for Aeronautical applications And Bio-Sensor fabrication and testing for real time applications Salary Consolidated based on the Experience (Rs.45000 to Rs.55000) Appointment period 6 months (extendable up to the closure of project.) Note: 1. Monthly fellowship will be released after monthly progress review report. 2. In case of unsatisfactory progress, the candidate may be asked to leave after giving one-month notice. Essential Qualification 1. PhD with BE/BTech/MTECH/Equivalent in /EE/Physics/Biotech/other relevant branches with research (1) focus in the area of MEMS fabrication. Candidate with relevant experience and publication in standard MEMS journals will have added advantage. (2) focus in the area of Bio Sensors. Candidate with relevant experience and publication in standard Bio Sensors journals will have added advantage. Selection Procedure Candidates will be shortlisted based on the eligibility criteria, academic record, and relevant experience. Only, shortlisted candidates will be intimated through email for the online interview by the selection committee. Merely meeting the criteria may not guarantee a call for an interview. The position will be left vacant and new advertisement with extended date will be given if no suitable candidate is found. For more details about our work, please visit Shiv Govind Singh | IIT Hyderabad Contact Person: Prof. Shiv Govind Singh, Department of Electrical Engineering, Indian Institute of Technology,Hyderabad, Kandi, 502285, Sangareddy,…

ads.title: Applications Invited for Post-Doctoral Research Fellowship, Department of Electrical Engineering
ads.raw_text_excerpt: Applications Invited for Post-Doctoral Research Fellowship, Department of Electrical Engineering  Applications Invited for Post-Doctoral Research Fellowship, Department of Electrical Engineering
ads.pdf_excerpt: Type of The position is for one year, with an extension subject to performance. Position: Fellowship: Consolidated pay Rs. 55,000 to 65,000 per month (negotiable) – If selected, an applicant cannot avail of any other fellowship in parallel. Eligibility: • Ph.D. with Master and BE/BTech/Equivalent in Computer science/ECE/EEE/ Information Technology/Mechnical/Aerospace with relevant research/industrial experience. • Publication in standard journals will have an added advantage. • The candidate should have good academic records throughout and good writing skills. • Candidates should not have published in Predatory Journals. • CGPA should be greater than or equal to 7.5 in both undergraduate and masters’ levels. • Candidates who submitted the thesis and waiting for thesis defense are also encouraged to apply. Experience: 0-1 Years of Experience Job Description: • Collection of relevant literature • Expertise in one of the domain areas listed below. Position: Post-Doctoral Research Fellow (CSE/IT/ECE/EEE/Mechanical/Aerospace) How to Apply: • Candidates, who fulfil the eligibility criteria, should apply through the link given above • For more details, please visit https://iith.ac.in Selection Procedure: • Candidates will be shortlisted based on their eligibility criteria, academic record, and relevant experience • Only shortlisted candidates will be intimated through email for the interview by the selection committee • Merely meeting the criteria may not guarantee a call for an interview • The position will be left vacant, and a new advertisement with an extended date will be given if no suitable candidate is found. Other criteria: • IIT HYDERABAD will not provide accommodation. • Please note that the position is on-site & Within IIT Hyderabad campus.

ads.title: Detailed Advertisement
ads.raw_text_excerpt: Detailed Advertisement  IITH invites online applications for Junior Psychological Counsellor through Direct Recruitment. Recruitment Notification No. NF/19 Detailed Advertisement Cancellation Notice: Click here .
ads.pdf_excerpt: Essential and desirable qualifications for the posts Essential: (i) Minimum 55% marks in the Master of Philosophy (M.Phil) in Clinical Psychology with 1 year of relevant experience after the M.Phil degree. (OR) Minimum 55% Marks in MA/MSc Degree in Clinical Psychology or Counselling Psychology with 2 years of relevant experience after Masters Degree. / Public Sector Undertakings / Autonomous Bodies/ Universities should produce a ‘No Objection Certificate (NOC)’ at the time of interview / written test/ skill test/certificate verification, without which the Candidate will not be allowed for the interview/ written test/ skill test. 17. The Institute reserves the right not to fill any or all advertised posts; cancel the advertisement in whole or in part without assigning any reason. The decision of the Institute in this regard shall be final. The Institute strives to have a workforce that reflects gender balance, and women candidates are encouraged to apply. The decision of the Institute in all matters relating to the eligibility of the candidate, skill/written test and selection shall be final and binding on all the candidates. No correspondence or personal inquiries shall be entertained. SYLLABUS FOR WRITTEN TEST 1. Theories in Psychology: Fundamental theories across various schools of thought. 2. Psychopathology: Signs and symptoms of various mental health disorders, diagnostic criteria based on DSM 5 and ICD 10 and, and assessment tools. 3. Therapies and Interventions: Different forms of psychotherapies for various mental health conditions and interventions for suicide prevention. 4. English Proficiency: Comprehension abilities and written skills would be assessed. 5. Computer Aptitude: Knowledge about Ms Office and basic computer skills. 6. Research Aptitude:…

ads.title: Applications are invited for the Position of Energy Manager, Energy Assessment Engineer, and Field Technicians under a sponsored project at IEAC IIT Hyderabad
ads.raw_text_excerpt: Applications are invited for the Position of Energy Manager, Energy Assessment Engineer, and Field Technicians under a sponsored project at IEAC IIT Hyderabad  Applications are invited for the Position of Energy Manager, Energy Assessment Engineer, and Field Technicians under a sponsored project at IEAC IIT Hyderabad
ads.pdf_excerpt: Applications are invited to hire Energy Manager, Energy Assessment Engineer and Field technicians for Kotak-IITM Save Energy Mission (KISEM) at IIT Hyderabad. The primary objective of this project is to conduct an energy assessment for MSMEs to enhance their energy efficiency and reduce their overall carbon footprints. The KISEM project team at IIT Hyderabad comprises eight Professors from various domains, a Certified Energy Auditor, Energy Manager and Energy Assessment Engineers. The selected candidates will be involved in carrying out walk-through and detailed energy assessments for specific process industries that come under the MSME category and come up with various customized energy conservation measures in the form of the assessment report and guide the industries in all possible ways to implement the same.

structured_positions.methods_preference: BEE-certified Energy Manager methods; HT/LT line work

qualifications.other: BEE Certified Energy Manager (obtained before 2022). BE/B.Tech in Electrical Engineering. ME/M.Tech in Power electronics or Energy Management. Min 60% marks/6.5 CGPA (55%/6.0 for SC/ST) in UG or PG. Preferred: 1-3 years (PG) or 3-4 years (UG) as Energy Manager; energy intensive industries with energy saving records; ≥5 energy assessments; HT/LT lines hands-on.

structured_positions.raw_section_text: Energy Manager at IIT Hyderabad KISEM. Visit MSMEs for equipment assessments; coordinate Energy Assessment Engineers and technicians; assist Energy Auditors. Required: BEE Certified Energy Manager (before 2022); BE/B.Tech Electrical; ME/M.Tech Power Electronics or Energy Management; 60%+/6.5 CGPA (SC/ST 55%/6.0). 1-3 yrs PG or 3-4 yrs UG experience. Pay: ₹60,000-70,000.

qualifications.other: Diploma in Electrical/Mechanical Engineering. Min 60%/6.5 CGPA (SC/ST 55%/6.0) in Diploma. 3-4 years in Engineering & Maintenance department. Worked in energy intensive industries. Hands-on with energy consuming equipment, energy assessment instruments.

structured_positions.raw_section_text: Field Technician (2 positions) at KISEM. Visit MSMEs for equipment assessment with Energy Manager and engineers; data collection in coordination with machine operators; instrument operation. Required: Diploma in Electrical/Mechanical Engineering, 60%+. 3-4 yrs in Engg & Maintenance. Energy intensive industry experience. Pay: ₹20,000-30,000.

qualifications.other: BE/B.Tech/ME/M.Tech in Electrical or Mechanical Engineering. Min 60%/6.5 CGPA (SC/ST 55%/6.0). 1-2 yrs PG or 2-3 yrs UG. Worked in energy audit firms or energy intensive industries. Hands-on with energy consuming equipment, energy assessment instruments.

structured_positions.raw_section_text: Energy Assessment Engineer at KISEM. Visit MSMEs for equipment assessment with Energy Manager; data collection and recording; instrument use and calibration tracking. Required: BE/B.Tech/ME/M.Tech Electrical/Mechanical. 60%+. 1-2 yrs PG or 2-3 yrs UG. Energy audit/intensive industry experience. Pay: ₹35,000-45,000.

structured_position.methods_preference: BEE-certified Energy Manager methods; HT/LT line work

ads.pdf_excerpt: ​Selection process:​ ​1.​ ​Shortlisting of applications as per the eligibility criteria and experience only.​ ​2.​ ​Online/offline Coding Test/Technical Interview​ ​3.​ ​Online/offline personal Interview.​ ​13. Test Lead - Manual & Automation​ ​Eligibility: Any Graduate/Post Graduate​ ​Require Experience: 4+ to 8 years.​ ​Consolidated Salary Range: 10 to 25 lakhs per annum.​ ​●​ ​Lead the QA team in the planning, development, and execution of both manual and automated​ ​test strategies.​ ​●​ ​Define test plans, test cases, and test scripts based on software requirements and technical​ ​specifications.​ ​●​ ​Implement and maintain automation frameworks using tools such as Selenium, TestNG, JUnit,​ ​Postman, or similar.​ ​●​ ​Conduct regression, integration, system, smoke, and user acceptance testing (UAT).​ ​●​ ​Analyze test results, identify root causes, and ensure timely resolution of defects.​ ​For the above posts send your updated resume to:​​recruitment.project@cse.iith.ac.in​​by​ ​mentioning the post Name in the subject line.​ ​Points to check before applying:​ ​1.​ ​The candidate should apply to only one post. Multiple applications by the same candidate will be​ ​automatically rejected.​ ​2.​ ​The candidate should check the​​Eligibility​​before​​applying. No queries will not be entertained.​ ​3.​ ​Shortlisted candidates will be intimated for further rounds via e-mail, and the Interview process​ ​will be conducted only after submission of eligibility documents and experience documents.​ ​4.​ ​No queries will be answered in reply to the email.​

ads.pdf_excerpt: Applications are invited to hire Energy Manager, Energy Assessment Engineers, and Project Assistant for the Kotak-IITM Save Energy Mission (KISEM) at IIT Hyderabad. The primary objective of this project is to conduct an energy assessment for MSMEs to enhance their energy efficiency and reduce their overall carbon footprints. The KISEM project team at IIT Hyderabad comprises Professors from various domains, a Certified Energy Auditor, Energy Manager and Energy Assessment Engineers. The selected candidates will be involved in carrying out walk-throughs and detailed energy assessments for specific process industries that come under the MSME category and come up with various customized energy conservation measures in the form of the assessment report and guide the industries in all possible ways to implement the same.

No. ADMN/RECTT/FACULTY/2025/10 Date: 19.12.2025 FACULTY RECRUITMENT IIM Mumbai erstwhile known as NITIE Mumbai was established by the Government of India in 1963. IIM Mumbai has been consistently ranked among the top B-schools in India. IIM Mumbai is ranked 6th in the National Institutional Ranking Framework (NIRF) rankings for 2025 among Management Institutes across India. IIM Mumbai is committed to creating skilled professionals in diverse functional areas like, Analytics, Economics & Finance, Marketing, OSCM, Sustainability Entrepreneurship and OBHR. Located in the Financial Capital of the country, IIM Mumbai has clos…
ads.pdf_excerpt: Located in the Financial Capital of the country, IIM Mumbai has close interactions with the leading corporate houses, giving it the added advantage of integrating classroom knowledge with relevant practical inputs from industry professionals. IIM Mumbai's picturesque campus is surrounded on three sides by lakes. IIM Mumbai invites applications for faculty positions with strong academic background for the position of as Professor and Associate Professor in the following broad areas: Sr. Preferable Designation Qualifications & Experience No. Age Limit Candidates should have a Ph.D. or equivalent with a successful track record of research and publication and a minimum of 10 years of teaching/research experience, 1. Professor 50 years of which at least 04 years should be at the level of Associate Professor at an institution of repute. Candidates should have a Ph.D. or equivalent with a successful track record of Associate research and publications and a minimum of 06 years of teaching/research experience, 2. 45 years Professor of which at least 03 years should be at the level of Assistant Professor (Grade-I) at an institution of repute. No correspondence/queries will be entertained from candidates regarding e-mail delays, conduct and result of interview, and reasons for not being called for the research seminar and interview. 14. Scrutiny/screening and shortlisting of the applications received will be carried out by the Institute as per requirement depending on the Academic Area(s) and Position(s) desired to be filled. 15. The Screening Criteria mentioned against each post above are only the minimum and the Screening Committee of the Institute reserves the right to devise its own relevant criteria for shortlisting of applications. Mere eligibility will not vest any right…

ads.pdf_excerpt: ENGAGEMENT OF FACILITY MANAGER Indian Institute of Science (IISc), Bangalore invites applications for the position of Facility Manager in the Advanced Facility for Microscopy and Microanalysis (AFMM). The details are as follows: (ii) General Instructions (a) The Candidate must possess the essential prescribed qualifications on or before the last date of submitting the application. (b) Qualifications other than one prescribed in this advertisement will not be accepted. (c) Engagement on a contract basis would be subject to medical fitness. (d) Except the consolidated and fixed emoluments, no other benefits will be extended. (e) The contract can be terminated at any time by giving one month’s notice, by either side. (f) Candidature/contract of candidate(s) submitting false certificates or suppression/submission of incorrect information shall be liable for termination/disqualification/rejection at any stage. (g) Prescribed educational qualifications and experience are the minimum eligibility required, and the mere fact that a candidate possesses the same shall not entitle him/her to be called for a written test/interview. The Institute reserves the right to restrict the no. of candidates admitted for the interview to a reasonable number, based on qualifications and/or experience.

ads.title: Visiting Faculty Positions (Open Rank, 2026–2027)
ads.raw_text_excerpt: Ashoka University, Department of Sociology & Anthropology — Visiting Faculty Positions (Open Rank | 2026–2027). Sonipat, Haryana. Open: 1 May 2026. Deadline: 1 Jun 2026 (11:59 PM ET). Semesters: Monsoon (25 Aug – 13 Dec 2026), Spring (19 Jan – 9 May 2027). Apply for one or both semesters. Preferred areas: STS, Gender & Sexuality, Caste, Legal Anthropology, Medical Anthropology. Qualifications: PhD; strong teaching; active research. Responsibilities: Teach 2 courses/semester; engage in academic activities. Apply with: Cover Letter, CV, Syllabi, Teaching Statement.
ads.unit_eligibility: PhD; strong teaching; active research; 2 courses/semester
ads._source_note: Hand-transcribed from a Sociology & Anthropology recruitment card circulated outside Ashoka's career page. The Interfolio application URL (apply.interfolio.com/185751) is the only verifiable artefact — no primary-source URL on ashoka.edu.in was located at the time of entry. parse_confidence is set to 0.4 to flag this provenance gap to downstream readers. Visiting Faculty is a contractual, semester-bound labour category distinct from the structural-vacancy analysis the rest of the site is built on; surfaced under the dedicated Visiting Faculty filter.
